evals.prompt: Analyze what's new in Skia that we should know about. Do a full scan.
evals.expected_output: Full scan of all milestones. Should find SkMesh, gradient interpolation, HDR pipeline, SkPathBuilder, runtime shader image filters. Should produce both slides and gap analysis. JSON should pass validation.
expectations: Produces a JSON that passes validate-skia-analyst.py
findings array has at least 30 items
Both slides and changelog are non-empty
At least one finding with impact 'transformative'
At least one finding with bindingStatus 'missing'

evals.prompt: What changed between v3.119.4-preview.1.1 and origin/main?
evals.expected_output: Diff mode between two refs. Should find variable fonts, color palettes, SKPathBuilder, security hardening, Skia m147 bump. Should have upstream benefits from m134-m147.
expectations: At least one finding with changeType 'upstream'
At least one finding with changeType 'added'
slides mentions variable fonts or SKPathBuilder
changelog has a Breaking Changes section

evals.expected_output: Windowed scan m133-m147. Should find SkPath immutability, gradient interpolation in P3/Rec2020, HDR metadata, kR16_unorm, kRec709 correction.
expectations: At least one finding mentions SkPath or SkPathBuilder
At least one finding mentions gradient interpolation
